If you don’t want to shell out the higher bucks for one of Whisker’s newest Litter-Robot models that only released a few months ago, the brand’s official Amazon storefront is offering its Litter-Robot 3 Connect Automatic Self-Cleaning Litter Box at $499 shipped in both white and grey colorways. These legacy models are no longer sold directly from the brand’s website, but through Amazon it starts at $549, which has mostly been discounted down at $499 since November, with only occasional spikes back up. Jumping on this deal not only scores you $50 off the going rate at the best price we have tracked to date, but it also comes in $100 under the starting prices on the newer models/bundles direct from the Whisker website.
